ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, which could be improved for overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>This arm shows good consistency with the character and context relevance due to temple setting but lacks naturalness in tone, which affects its overall quality slightly.

The response is highly relevant, consistent with the persona of a Temple Priest who values ethics and guidance while also showing understanding towards urgent needs in extraordinary circumstances. The naturalness and overall quality are excellent as well.
